title: AutoHeal - User Input Protection: Focus Theft Detection & Auto-Recovery
desc: [RULE] Skill content MUST be in English -- Korean uses 2-3x tokens. Multi-layer system protecting user focus from CDP/Chrome theft during ask operations. LIVING DOCUMENT: update as each incident is investigated and resolved. MANDATORY: all restore paths through InputReadiness pipeline. RESTORE TRIGGER: end of each ask/CDP action boundary only. Watchdog = monitor+notify only.
steps: 0. [RULE] ALL skill steps/desc/tags must be English only -- token efficiency.

1. [MANDATORY] ALL focus restore paths go through InputReadiness.Probe() -- OnProbeSuccess fires zoom+auto-hack. Standalone ForceForegroundWindow without InputReadiness FORBIDDEN (except RestoreFocusWithRetryAsync inner loop).
2. [MANDATORY] Restore trigger = end of each ask/CDP action only. Watchdog = monitor+notify only, no restore.

3. [INVESTIGATION PROCEDURE] When focus theft suspected: (a) which ask action was running (insert/send/attach/wait), (b) which CDP method it calls (Page.bringToFront/Browser.setWindowBounds/Runtime.evaluate+.focus()), (c) IsFocusStealingMethod() covers it?, (d) pre-minimize SW=8 not 6?, (e) post-restore applied?, (f) OnFocusTheft callback restores focus?

4. [CDP FOCUS-STEALING METHODS] Page.bringToFront, Target.activateTarget (no-op), Browser.setWindowBounds, Runtime.evaluate+.focus(). Gatekeepers: IsFocusStealingMethod() + IsFocusRiskExpression() in CdpClient.FocusRiskWatchdog.cs. Pre-minimize MUST use SW_SHOWMINNOACTIVE(8) not SW_MINIMIZE(6).

5. [KNOWN INSTABILITY] bringToFront: Chrome SetForegroundWindow fires async after CDP response. setWindowBounds restore: Chrome may activate before WaitForWindowStateAsync confirms. Runtime.evaluate: JS .focus() bypasses IsFocusStealingMethod entirely.
9. [DONE] OnFocusTheft callback: was log-only, now fires RestoreFocusWithRetryAsync (AskCommands.Entry.Cdp.cs)
11. [DONE] DismissDialogAsync: added 동의 + called after file-attach + before insert
author: claude
